title: The Ghost in the Darkness
overview: While exploring the deep woods, Youtuber Morgan stumbles upon a camera containing footage of a Satanic ritual and possible murder.  When the police dismiss it as a fake, she and her friend Amber set out to prove otherwise, putting themselves right in harm's way.
